rules.name: 弱模型霸榜检测
rules.trigger: any model with capability < 0.70 appears in comprehensive top 3

diagnose.explanation: 性价比公式对低价弱模型过度偏袒，使 capability < 0.70 的模型排进 Top 3

fix.description: capability 做指数惩罚(capability²) + 设能力门槛 ≥ 0.70

rules.name: 性价比分数极端偏斜
rules.trigger: max ce_raw is more than 3x the median ce_raw

diagnose.explanation: 对数缩放后性价比仍严重偏斜，存在超低价模型

fix.description: capability² 抑制弱模型性价比膨胀

rules.name: 同厂商模型重复上榜
rules.trigger: same vendor appears more than 4 times in top 10

diagnose.explanation: 同一厂商的多个变体占据过多位置，减少排名多样性

fix.description: 综合排名 Top 10 中，每个厂商最多 3 个模型

rules.name: 价格数据缺失检测
rules.trigger: model with zero or missing price appears in top 10

diagnose.explanation: 缺失定价的模型不应进入排名，性价比无法计算

fix.description: 排除缺失定价数据的模型
